The '''''Strident''''' was a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] under the command of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]] during his attempted [[Zaarin insurrection|coup d'état]]. It was disabled and destroyed by the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Courageous (Imperial-class)|''Courageous'']]. [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] was involved in the operation.
